productDisplayName: Disney Kids-Unisex Pooh Steps Green Shoes
description: It's all about fun in this cute casual shoe from disney. Made of supple PU upper and a grippy outsole, be assured that your little one's feet are firm on the ground. Upper PU upper with perforations on the forefoot and overlays on the forefoot and heel Midfoot velcro closure strap with elastic bands for a snug Fit Padded tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed with a complete fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfort Cartoon prints embossed on the upper for style Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot, pivot point for easy 180 degree movement, waffle pattern lugs in the backfoot and suction grooves along the periphery for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
